summary: Iteration 123: REGRESSION TEST after Electron download.js fix and WhatsApp tmpfiles.org URL fix. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Login works, all main tabs load correctly, CashBook/Ledgers/Settings pages work with sub-tabs, PDF/Excel export buttons present.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed (pre-existing issue)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Login flow works (username: admin, password: admin123)
VERIFIED: POST /api/auth/login returns 200 with user data
VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/party-ledger/pdf returns valid PDF (Content-Type: application/pdf, PDF magic bytes)
VERIFIED: GET /api/cash-book/excel returns valid Excel (Content-Type: spreadsheet, PK zip header)
VERIFIED: GET /api/whatsapp/settings returns WhatsApp config with api_key_masked
VERIFIED: CashBook page loads with sub-tabs (Cash Transactions, Party Ledgers, Party Summary, GST Ledger)
VERIFIED: Ledgers page shows Party Ledger with Excel/PDF export buttons
VERIFIED: Settings page loads with 5 sub-tabs (Branding, GST, Stock, Messaging, Data)
VERIFIED: Messaging sub-tab shows 'WhatsApp Connected' status with API key configured
VERIFIED: Dashboard shows Rice Stock, Paddy Stock, Mandi Target vs Achieved
VERIFIED: Reports page shows CMR vs DC, Season P&L, Daily Report sub-tabs
VERIFIED: download.js rewritten for Electron + Browser dual support (window.open for Electron, blob for browser)
VERIFIED: whatsapp.py tmpfiles.org URL fix (http → https) at lines 235, 342
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 123 tested critical fixes: 1) download.js rewritten for Electron compatibility (uses window.open in Electron, blob approach in browser), 2) WhatsApp tmpfiles.org URL fixed from http to https in Python backend. All APIs working, all UI tabs loading correctly. WhatsApp is connected with API key configured. App version is v53.6.0.

login_flow.details: Login with admin/admin123 works, What's New dialog appears after login

party_ledger_pdf.details: GET /api/reports/party-ledger/pdf returns valid PDF with correct Content-Type

whatsapp_settings.details: GET /api/whatsapp/settings returns config with api_key_masked, country_code, default_numbers

cashbook_page.details: CashBook page loads with sub-tabs: Cash Transactions, Party Ledgers, Party Summary, GST Ledger

ledgers_page.details: Party Ledgers shows transactions with Excel/PDF export buttons

settings_page.details: Settings page loads with 5 sub-tabs: Branding, GST, Stock, Messaging, Data

messaging_subtab.details: WhatsApp Connected status shown, Telegram Bot section visible

dashboard_page.details: Shows Rice Stock, Paddy Stock, Mandi Target vs Achieved (106.1%)

reports_page.details: CMR vs DC report visible with Milling Output, DC Allotment sections

electron_specific_notes: The Electron-specific changes (download.js using window.open, main.js setWindowOpenHandler and will-download handlers) cannot be tested in this browser environment. Only the web version paths were tested. The download.js correctly detects Electron via window.electronAPI or window.ELECTRON_API_URL and uses window.open() which triggers the main process downloadURL handler.
